name: Demo Project
description: This demo uses all GRN inference algorithms to show how GRNScope compares individual methods, builds a consensus network, and visualizes predicted gene regulatory relationships through an interactive graph, edge table, and overlap summary.

inputs.name: ExpressionData.csv
inputs.description: Demo expression matrix with genes as rows and cells as columns.

inputs.name: PseudoTime.csv
inputs.description: Demo pseudotime file used by pseudotime-based algorithms.
